title: cenostigma pinnatum var. savannarum
intro: Cenostigma pinnatum var. savannarum is a plant species in the family Fabaceae, commonly known as a medicinal plant. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which are attributed to its chemical compounds, including flavonoids and saponins. Cenostigma pinnatum var. savannarum has been reported to have various health benefits, including the treatment of fever, rheumatism, and gastrointestinal issues. The plant is often prepared as a decoction or infusion, and it can also be used as a topical application to treat skin conditions and wounds.
